query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: A champagne flute filled with golden liquid stands on a ledge in the left foreground. Beyond it, a narrow cobblestone street at night stretches between rows of multi-story brick buildings. A fire truck with glowing red and blue lights sits in the middle of the road, where several figures stand nearby. Fireworks burst overhead in the dark sky, while colorful reflections scatter across the wet pavement. A parked car is visible on the right, and illuminated storefront signs line the street walls.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A champagne flute filled with golden liquid occupies the left foreground, rendered soft and diffused by shallow depth of field. Behind the glass, a narrow cobblestone street at night recedes between multi-story brick buildings. A fire truck with flashing red and blue lights sits in the middle of the road, attended by several figures. Fireworks streak across the dark sky above, while vivid reflections of emergency lights scatter across the wet cobblestones. A parked car appears on the right, and illuminated shopfronts line the street.
